source.title: Crane Auxiliary Jib Detachment - Eugene Island 252 I Facility

context.region: Gulf of Mexico - Eugene Island Block 252

event.top_event: Structural Damage - Crane Auxiliary Jib Detachment
actions_taken: Crane boom placed over heliport to prevent auxiliary jib from falling to deck
Crane placed out of service immediately
Crane operator scheduled to attend Crane Operator & Rigging refresher training
Arena evaluating internal process with field leadership to improve selection and assignments of crane operators
event.summary: On August 20, 2023, at approximately 1000 hours, the auxiliary jib on the platform crane detached while attempting to relocate a construction supply box weighing 3,886 lbs. The crane operator failed to center the auxiliary line over the construction supply box, causing it to become lodged on a capping beam. Continued lifting created a side loading effect that caused the boom to twist, shearing the auxiliary jib bolts and causing the jib to detach. The auxiliary jib became entangled in hydraulic lines, preventing it from falling to the deck. The rigger failed to communicate the all stop signal. No injuries occurred. Repairs totaled $80,000.
recommendations: Crane operator to attend refresher training through different training program
Arena to improve internal process for selection and assignment of crane operators on facilities
key_phrases: failed to center the auxiliary line
bolts holding the auxiliary jib to shear
failed to communicate the all stop signal

threats.name: Improper Load Positioning - Auxiliary Line Not Centered
Load Obstruction - Supply Box Lodged on Capping Beam
Excessive Force Application to Crane Boom
Failed Communication - No All Stop Signal

consequences.name: Potential Personnel Injury from Falling Equipment

controls.name: Job Safety Analysis (JSA) for Crane Operations
controls.barrier_role: Procedural guidance to prevent side loading

supporting_text: The Job Safety Analysis that was completed for the crane operations that morning discussed centering the crane over the lift to prevent side loading the crane
The crane operator failed to center the auxiliary line over the construction supply box

controls.name: Crane Operator Competence and Training
controls.barrier_role: Ensure qualified personnel operate crane safely

supporting_text: the crane operator had only one hitch at EI 252 I
Inadequate knowledge of equipment operation: The crane operator failed to center the auxiliary line over the construction supply box
The crane operator has been scheduled to attend a Crane Operator & Rigging refresher training

controls.name: Rigger Visual Observation and Monitoring
controls.barrier_role: Detect unsafe conditions during lift and stop operation

supporting_text: The rigger observed the lift but failed to communicate the all stop signal to the crane operator
The rigger failed to communicate the all stop signal once he realized the construction supply box footing was wedged on a capping beam
Inadequate communication: The rigger failed to communicate the all stop signal once he realized the construction supply box was wedged

controls.name: Crane Load Rating and Capacity Limits
controls.lod_basis: Design limit to prevent structural failure

supporting_text: As per the lifting plan, the auxiliary line was rated for 9115 lbs
the crane operator also failed to determine the amount of force being applied to the crane boom while continuing to attempt the lift causing the auxiliary jib bolts to shear

controls.name: Crane Operator Selection and Assignment Process
controls.barrier_role: Ensure appropriate operator experience for facility

supporting_text: the crane operator had only one hitch at EI 252 I
Arena is currently evaluating an internal process with field leadership to improve the selection and assignments of crane operators on Arena facilities

controls.name: Crane Structural Integrity - Bolted Connections
controls.barrier_role: Maintain structural connection under normal loads

supporting_text: The force caused the boom to twist and the bolts holding the auxiliary jib to shear
the auxiliary jib bolts to shear. The twisting of the boom also caused the vertical side plates to separate and the jib sheave pin to dislodge

controls.name: Hydraulic Hose Lines as Secondary Retention
controls.barrier_role: Prevent falling equipment from reaching deck
controls.lod_basis: Unintended secondary catch that prevented escalation

supporting_text: The auxiliary jib detached from the boom and became entangled in the hydraulic lines which kept the auxiliary jib from falling to the deck
There were no injuries to personnel due to this incident

controls.name: Emergency Response - Crane Boom Positioning Over Heliport
controls.barrier_role: Prevent further escalation and secure damaged equipment
controls.lod_basis: Post-event action to prevent further consequences

supporting_text: The crane boom was placed over the heliport to prevent the auxiliary jib from falling to the deck
The crane was placed out of service immediately
Arena Offshore, LP failed to perform operations in a safe and workmanlike manner

After further investigation, it was discovered that the bottom of the construction supply box became wedged under the elevated capping beam while attempting the lift due to the auxiliary line not being centered over the construction supply box

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
